The '''Juniper Chest''' was a sacred item to the [[Gupin/Legends|Gupins]] of the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. The decorated chest provided energy and power to the Gupins, which allowed them to [[Changeling/Legends|shapeshift]]. The chest was the focal point of the Gupin [[Time of Renewal|Renewal Ceremony]], during which the Gupins used a sacred key to open the chest and rejuvenated their powers.<ref name="Land of the Gupins" />

Eventually, the Gupins' rivals, the [[Grass Trekker/Legends|Grass Trekkers]], were given the key by the Gupin [[Punt]].<ref name="Land of the Gupins" /> In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date note">{{InsiderCite|23|Star Wars Publications Timeline|''Star Wars'' Publications Timeline}} dates the events of the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] animated series, which include the appearance of the Juniper Chest in "[[The Land of the Gupins]]," to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which corresponds to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> The Gupins secured the aid of the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] to reclaim the key and restore their powers.<ref name="Land of the Gupins" />

{{Stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Juniper Chest first appeared in "[[The Land of the Gupins]],"<ref name="Land of the Gupins" /> the eighth episode of the animated television series [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']]. The episode was written by [[Bob Carrau]] and premiered on [[October 26]], [[1985]].<ref name="Insider 27">{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}}</ref>
